ideation: This animation sequence simulates the action of carefully unrolling a roll of paper.  The robot will use both arms to mimic this action. Frame 1 will show the robot grasping the roll of paper. Frame 2 will show the robot starting to unroll the paper. Frame 3 will show the robot continuing to unroll the paper. Frame 4 will show the robot with the paper fully unrolled. I will use the existing examples to ensure smooth and natural movements.

frames.beat: arms reach out, ready to grasp the roll
fingers curl around the paper roll gently
arms begin to unroll the paper slowly
the paper is fully unrolled, hanging loose
